extensionDescription.message: Copies pinned tabs to new windows with selectable duplicate or shared-state behavior.

modeSharedDescription.message: One live tab is moved between windows, while the other windows show lightweight placeholders.

modeDuplicateDescription.message: Each new window gets its own pinned tab copies, but pages load only after you select them.

lazyDescription.message: This page will load when the tab is selected.

sharedDescription.message: The live tab will move here when this proxy is selected.
